# GEN — Auto Content Engine API

> GEN is an Autonomous Social Media Agent. It detects trends, generates video content, publishes across platforms, and improves automatically.

The Auto Content Engine API provides programmatic access to GEN's content creation system.

## Docs

- [API Documentation](https://api.gen.pro)
- [OpenAPI 3.1 Spec](https://api.gen.pro/openapi.yaml)
- [Getting Started](https://api.gen.pro/guides/introduction/)
- [Authentication](https://api.gen.pro/guides/authentication/)
- [Quick Start](https://api.gen.pro/guides/quickstart/)

## API

Base URL: https://api.gen.pro/v1
Auth: X-API-Key header with Personal Access Token

### Endpoints

- GET /v1/me — current user
- GET /v1/workspaces — list workspaces
- GET /v1/agents — list agents
- POST /v1/persisted_tokens — create API key
- GET /v1/persisted_tokens — list API keys
- POST /v1/autocontentengine — create content engine
- GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id} — get content engine
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/clone — clone content engine
- GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows — list rows
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows — create row
- GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/columns — list columns
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/columns — create column
- GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id} — get cell
- PATCH /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id} — update cell
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/generate — generate content
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/layers — create layer
- GET /v1/generations/{id} — check generation status
- POST /v1/generations/{id}/stop — stop generation
- GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/global_variables — get variables
- GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/automation_config — get webhook config
- PATCH /v1/agents/{agent_id}/automation_config — update webhook config

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://api.gen.pro/llms-full.txt)
- [Help Center](https://docs.gen.pro)
